name: graphnosis-app
description: Personal second-memory desktop app powered by Graphnosis. Local-first, encrypted, multi-graph, attaches relevant subgraph context to any MCP-aware AI.
author: Nehloo Interactive LLC

scripts.mcpb:pack: cd mcpb && mcpb pack . ../graphnosis.mcpb && echo Done: graphnosis.mcpb

pnpm._comment_overrides: All overrides removed (May 2026). Previously: secure-sync pinned to a local working copy until v0.1.2 shipped with the static-import libsodium fix; @nehloo/graphnosis pinned to a local working copy while serializeSubgraph export + log-redact were pre-release in v0.5.3. Both deps are now consumed from their tagged npm releases — see apps/desktop-sidecar/package.json. Keep this empty `overrides` block so future maintainers see the trail; pnpm tolerates empty objects fine.
pnpm._comment_packageExtensions: libsodium-wrappers-sumo@0.7.16 ships a broken ESM entry (relative import to ./libsodium-sumo.mjs that the package doesn't include in its files array). Force its `.` export to point to the CJS file in ALL conditions so bundlers (Bun --compile, Vite, etc.) never pick the broken .mjs. Without this, `bun build --compile` of the sidecar fails with 'Could not resolve ./libsodium-sumo.mjs'.
